name: pyramid-policy
description: P6.8 canonical pyramiding diagnosis: walks each trade's excursion path and simulates structured add-entries at configurable R-levels (add at +1R, move stop to entry). Measures per-level trigger rate, average improvement, and breakeven rate — pure diagnosis, no engine changes. Run after any backtest that produced ≥10 trades with excursion paths to see whether pyramiding would help the strategy.
